appStatus.offlineBody: Saved chats and shortcuts stay available on this device. Live chat, canteen search, maps and transcription need a connection.

contact.title: Say Hello!
contact.description: Have any questions, suggestions, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us directly via email.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.disclaimer: The content of this website was created with the utmost care. However, no guarantee is assumed for the accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of the content.
legal.liability: Liability notice: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The respective operators are solely responsible for the content of the linked pages.

studentProject.title: Student Project
studentProject.description: Developed by students for students, aiming to improve the campus dining experience.

mcp.title: Smart Data Retrieval via MCP
mcp.description: Uses the MCP standard to provide accurate and helpful responses about canteen menus.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built with modern technologies and completely open source for community contributions.

fastReliable.title: Fast & Reliable
fastReliable.description: Optimized for speed to give you the information you need in seconds.

0.name: Tobias Veselsky
0.role: Full-Stack Developer, AI Systems Architect & Technical Lead
0.description: Full-Stack & Architecture, agentic LLM workflows, MCP tooling, backend services, API and tooling interfaces, CI/CD pipelines, and major frontend features including the final chat interface, streamed tool data and product integration.

1.name: Judith Bucher
1.description: Led the design and key frontend features of the application, including routing, multilingual support, central reusable design components, theming, and visual consistency across the entire product, while also contributing to product polish and project coordination.

2.name: Maximilian Krupper
2.description: Built core UI foundations including the header, sidebar, reusable design components, and early chat page layout that established the application’s structural interface.

3.name: Nils Herbig
3.role: Design, User Research, Evaluation & Scientific Communication
3.description: Planned and evaluated multiple user studies, contributed significantly to the project paper, and helped communicate the project clearly through presentations and research documentation.

4.name: Christos Labroussis
4.description: Co-developed data acquisition for STW Berlin and additional canteens, and designed an exploratory chat interface concept during early product iteration.

5.name: Tamim Ayach
5.description: Co-developed data acquisition for STW Berlin and additional canteens, and designed an exploratory chat interface concept during early product iteration.

6.name: Dr.-Ing. Stefan Hillmann
6.description: Supported the project as academic supervisor at TU Berlin, providing methodological guidance, feedback, and oversight throughout development, evaluation, and documentation.

canteens.title: Discover Canteens
canteens.subtitle: Find your canteen, start a new chat and ask directly about menus, opening hours or prices.
canteens.emptyBody: Adjust your search or check if the name is correct.
canteens.offlineBody: Reconnect to search for canteens and load current canteen data.
canteens.offline: Canteen search is unavailable while you are offline.
canteens.error: Could not load canteens. Please try again.

map.title: Canteens on the Map
map.subtitle: Zoom in to discover locations. Tap on a pin for details and then start a chat with the selected canteen.
map.searchAriaLabel: Search for canteens on the map
map.defaultHint: Shows canteens in the current map view.
map.offlineBody: Reconnect to load map tiles, canteen locations and nearby search.
map.errorBody: Please set the environment variables VITE_MAPTILER_STYLE_URL_LIGHT and VITE_MAPTILER_STYLE_URL_DARK (each the complete Style-JSON URL incl. ?key=...).

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Save frequent queries including filter sets. Shortcuts can be edited and deleted here.
shortcuts.empty: You have not saved any shortcuts yet.
shortcuts.deleteSubtitle: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
shortcuts.deleteNote: Shortcuts are saved locally in the browser.

shortcutModal.description: Define name, prompt and filters. The prompt will be inserted into the chat field.
shortcutModal.name: Name
shortcutModal.promptPlaceholder: Message that will be inserted in the chat
shortcutModal.footerNote: Shortcuts are saved locally in the browser.
shortcutModal.nameError: Please enter a name for the shortcut.

hero.subtitle: Instantly find out what's on the menu at your canteen today. Ask MensaBot - fast, simple, and always up to date.

smart.title: Smart Answers
smart.description: Ask questions in natural language and get instant, relevant menu suggestions.

canteens.title: All Canteens at a Glance
canteens.description: Access over 1,000 canteens across Germany - always up to date.

fast.title: Lightning Fast & Simple
fast.description: No detours: know what's on the menu in seconds.

bottom.text: A student project at TU Berlin.

chat.welcome:
Hello! I'm your MensaBot. How can I help you?
Ask me about menus, opening hours, or prices.
Or use /command for quick access.

mode.label: Response mode
mode.fastDescription: Respond faster without the extra quality review.
mode.reliableDescription: Use the quality judge for more reliable answers.

streaming.judgeRunning: Quality check is reviewing the answer...
streaming.transportError: ❌ The live stream was interrupted. Please try again.

chat.menuLoadError: ❌ The menu could not be loaded. Please try again.
chat.noCanteenFound: ❌ No matching canteen found. Please check the name.
chat.canteenLoadError: ❌ The canteen could not be loaded. Please try again.
chat.serverError: ❌ Could not reach the server. Please try again later.
chat.geoNotSupported: Your browser does not support location sharing.
chat.geoFailed: Could not determine your location. Please enter it manually.
chat.selfLocationPrompt: Please enter your location in the text field below so I can find canteens near you.
chat.clarificationMultiHint: Select one or more options, then send them.

input.placeholder: Write a message or use / for quick actions
input.offlineDisabled: You are offline. Saved chats stay available, but sending messages needs a connection.
input.audioNotSupported: Audio recording is not supported by this browser.
input.audioStartFailed: Audio recording could not be started.

command.typeToSearch: Type to search for a canteen.

menu.noMenuPublished: No menu has been published for this date yet.
menu.emptyMenu: No dishes are listed for this date.
menu.filteredOut: All dishes were excluded by filters.
menu.apiError: The menu could not be loaded right now.
menu.noMeals: No dishes are listed for this date.

onboarding.welcome: Hi! 👋 I'm **MensaBot** - your smart canteen assistant.
onboarding.dataNotice: MensaBot is a **university research project**. User data may be collected and logged for evaluation purposes. For questions about data collection, please use the contact in the **Legal Notice**.
onboarding.priceCategorySelect: Are you a **student**, **employee**, **pupil** or **guest**? This helps me show you the right prices.
onboarding.dietQuestion: Do you have a **dietary preference** I should consider?
onboarding.allergyQuestion: Do you have any **allergies** I should consider when filtering?
onboarding.hints: 💡 **Tip:** You can adjust your filters anytime using the **"Filter"** button at the top. You can also create **Shortcuts** for your typical queries.
onboarding.quickAccessHint: ⚡ **Faster every day:** Save **Shortcuts** with prompt + filters for your usual requests. Create one with the **plus button at the bottom**. You can also use **slash commands** like `/tu_hardenbergstraße today` to see a canteen menu directly without delay for a quick overview.
onboarding.filterDisclaimer: ⚠️ **Important:** Filtering by diet type and **allergens** is **not fully supported** by most canteen data sources. We **cannot guarantee** the correctness of the filtering. Please treat the results only as **pre-filtering** and never rely 100% on the generated responses.
onboarding.complete: Great, you're all set! 🎉 Ask me about menus, opening hours, or prices.

body.native: Keep Mensabot one tap away and launch it like an app on this device.
body.ios: Add Mensabot to your Home Screen in Safari for faster access and a cleaner full-screen app.
body.mac: Add Mensabot to your Dock in Safari so it opens like a regular desktop app.

description.native: Install Mensabot on this device for faster access and a cleaner app-style launch.
description.ios: Open Safari's Share menu to add Mensabot to your Home Screen as a web app.
description.mac: Use Safari's Share menu to add Mensabot to your Dock.

instructions.sharedNote: Installation only takes a moment. Once added, Mensabot opens faster and feels more like a native app.

ios.title: Install on iPhone or iPad
ios.subtitle: Use Safari to add Mensabot to your Home Screen.

share.title: Open Share
share.body: Tap the Share button in Safari.

webapp.title: Keep Open as Web App enabled
webapp.body: If Safari shows Open as Web App, leave it enabled.

add.title: Add Mensabot
add.body: Tap Add to finish the installation.

mac.title: Install on Mac
mac.subtitle: Use Safari to add Mensabot to your Dock.

browser.title: Open Mensabot in Safari
browser.body: Make sure you are using Safari, not another browser.

share.title: Open Share
share.body: Click the Share button in Safari.

dock.title: Add to Dock
dock.body: Choose Add to Dock to install Mensabot.

header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Manage your app settings and saved data.

data.title: Data & Storage
data.subtitle: Manage your local chat data and the introduction wizard.

deleteChats.description: Permanently removes all saved chats from your browser.
deleteChats.note: Chats are saved locally in the browser.

restart.label: Restart onboarding
restart.description: Restarts the introduction wizard in the next new chat.

language.title: Language
language.label: Choose the language of the site.

theme.title: Appearance
theme.label: Choose the appearance of the site.

modal.title: Delete all chats
modal.subtitle: This will permanently remove all chat histories. This action cannot be undone.
modal.note: Chats are saved locally in the browser.
